childElements.name: Emission_Certification
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "Do you have emissions certification requirements?", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12.0, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Install-US Stat", "value" : "Install-US Stat", "autoAdv" : null }, { "name" : "Install-OutsideUS", "value" : "Install-OutsideUS", "autoAdv" : null } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Generator_Application
Seismic_Certification
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "What seismic certification do you require?", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12.0, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "IBC Seismic Certification", "value" : "IBC Seismic Certification", "autoAdv" : null }, { "name" : "OSHPD Seismic Certification", "value" : "OSHPD Seismic Certification", "autoAdv" : null } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Special_Application
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "Do you require a motor starting special application?", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12.0, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : true, "helpText" : "A \"motor starting special application\" is any situation where a generator is sized or designed specifically to handle the massive, brief surge of power required to start an electric motor.", "options" : [ { "name" : "None - Standard", "value" : "None - Standard", "autoAdv" : null }, { "name" : "Motor Starting", "value" : "Motor Starting", "autoAdv" : null } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "helpTextPos" : "bottom-left" }

childElements.name: Standards_and_Compliance
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "Review Standards & Compliancy Requirements", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12.0, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Certification-CSA", "value" : "Certification-CSA", "autoAdv" : null }, { "name" : "Listing-UL 2200", "value" : "Listing-UL 2200", "autoAdv" : null } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: Step1
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "Power Management Questions", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3, "nextLabel" : "Next", "nextWidth" : 3, "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : null, "allowSaveForLater" : true, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }
